type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2012, the metal content of the tailings was analysed.  The average arsenic concentration in of 0.51 microgram/gram = 0.000051% was used in the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Arsenic is an impurity in the ore and as a result it is manufactured and processed as an integral by-product that is a component of the ore throughout the manufacturing/processing activities.  Particulate matter emissions of the ore may contain traces of Arsenic.  
In 2012, the ore was analysed for metals and the Arsenic concentration of <0.5 microgram/gram = 0.000025 % was used for 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2012, the metal content of the tailings was analysed.  The average Cadmium concentration of 0.31 micrograms/gram = 0.000031% was used in the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Cadmium is an impurity of the ore and as a result, it is manufactured and processed as an integral component of the ore throughout the manufacturing/processing activities.  Particulate matter emissions of the ore may contain traces of Cadmium.  In 2012, the ore was analysed for metals and the Cadmium concentration of 0.14 microgram/gram = 0.000014% was used for the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Lead is an impurity of the ore and as a result it is manufactured and processed as an integral component of the ore throughout the manufacturing/processing activities.  Particulate emissions of the ore may contain traces of Lead.
In 2012, the ore was analysed for metals.  The Lead concentration of 5.4 micrograms/gram = 0.00054 % was used in the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2012, the metal content of the tailings was analysed.  The average concentration of Lead was 6.95 micrograms/gram = 0.000695%, which was used in the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Manganese is an emission to air from welding activities.
Manganese is also an impurity of the ore and, as a result, it is manufactured and processed as an integral component of the ore throughout the manufacturing/processing activities.  Particulate matter emissions of the ore may contain traces of Manganese.  In 2012, the ore was analysed for metals and the Manganese concentration was available for the first time.  The Managanese concentration in the ore is 200 microgram/gram = 0.02 %, which was used for the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The Manganese concentration was analyzed in the tailings for the first time in 2012 and applied to the 2011 threshold calculations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: welding rods and electrodes

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Mercury is an impurity of the ore and as a result it is manufactured and processed as an integral component of the ore throughout the manufacturing and processing activities.  Particulate matter emissions of the ore may contain traces of Mercury.  
Mercury was analyzed in the product at less than (<) 0.4 mg/kg.  In 2011, Unimin followed the NPRI Guide and used a concentration of 0.00002% in threshold concentrations. Pre-2011 threshold calculations used a concentration of 0.00004%

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Unimin followed the NPRI Guide which allows a "less than" concentration to be divided by two.  
Also tailings used in dam construction was used to reduce the tailings volume in 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Zinc is an impurity of the ore and, as a result, it is manufactured and processed as an integral component of the ore throughout the manufacturing/processing activities.  Particulate matter emissions of the ore may contain traces of Zinc.  In 2012, the ore was analysed for metals, and Zinc concentrations were made available for the first time. A Zinc concentration of 45 micrograms/gram = 0.0045 % was used for 2011 threshold concentrations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2012, the metal content of the tailings was analysed and Zinc concentrations were made available for the first time.  The average zinc concentration of 252.5 microgram/gram = 0.0252 % was used in the 2011 threshold concentrations.

In the previous reporting year, Carbon Monoxide quantities exceeded the 20,000 kg reporting threshold.  In 2010, the quantities of CO were slightly less than the reporting threshold.  For consistency, a decision was made to voluntarily report CO emissions

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Achieved full conversion of mineral dryer fuel from diesel to propane.  Corrected AP42 emission factors for pallet burning from 'fireplace' to 'open burning'

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Trace amounts of mercury are found in oil and grease.  The facility consumed less oil and grease than the previous reporting year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2009, there was a reduction in mining activities; reduction in mineral processing throughput and operating hours; and a reduction in product shipments.  In 2009, Unimin conducted open burning of an accumulation of 2-years of broken wooden pallets.
